title: Silver's Datapack Tags Library | DTL
description: a Light Weight Datapack used by most of my big projects!
body:
# Description
[Silver's Tags Library](https://modrinth.com/datapack/silvers-datapack-tags-library) is an expansive library containing some needed library tags used by some of my projects.

The project is constantly updated to fit the needs of up coming projects, bug fixes are also frequently found and patched.

The goal of the Library is to make sure all of my projects runs properly as it is the key for some of my projects to function properly, sure without it some will work, but specific and certain features will not work or break.



### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)


<details>
<summary>Old Description</summary>

This library contains some needed tags that is always going to be used in my large datapacks, these Tags are used for Ray cast and Entities that should be ignored!

</details>
